_comment: Episode 03 Ryani판 AI regen prompts. 한국 전통 수묵화 + 한지 텍스처 + 떠다니는 연등. EP02 Leo판이 중국 자금성/핑크 럭셔리였다면 이 ep는 한국 sumukhwa/sumi-e 정서. Ryani 흰 마킹 보존 강화. 색감 절제 (먹/한지 크림/연등 골드/리본 다홍).
_base_style: Transform this photo into a traditional Korean ink wash painting (수묵화/sumukhwa) aesthetic. Soft monochrome ink wash background with gentle hanji paper texture (creamy off-white with subtle fiber detail). Lots of negative space — Korean 단아함 (restrained elegance). Limited palette: ink black, hanji cream, deep ink blue, with one or two accent colors (lantern gold, vermilion red for paper lanterns). Vertical 9:16 composition. Maintain photorealistic pet features blended into the painted scene — the pet should look like a real animal sitting within a painted world, not turned into ink art itself.
_preserve_subjects: CRITICAL: Keep the pets faithfully recognizable. Small French bulldog (Ryani) — brachycephalic flat-faced breed, NO TAIL. Ryani is mostly BLACK but MUST keep her DISTINCTIVE WHITE MARKINGS that are her signature: white blaze on chin/muzzle, white chest patch, white toes/paws. Do NOT paint over the white markings, do not turn her solid black. Orange tabby cat (Leo) — preserve all tabby stripes, amber eyes, white whiskers, exact body proportions. Do not alter their poses, body shapes, or facial features. Only paint the world around them — the pets stay photographic.
cut1_ryani_greeting: Around Ryani (close-up portrait), gently dissolve the cafe background into a soft hanji paper-textured wash. A few delicate ink-brush lotus flowers bloom at the edges. One small paper lantern hangs at upper corner with warm golden glow. Subtle ink-wash mist around the lower portion of the frame. Restrained elegance. Ryani's face stays photographic with white chin/chest markings prominent.
cut2_ryani_contemplate: Replace the blue tile background with a serene hanji paper wash. Ink-brush bamboo silhouettes in soft gray on one side, with a single paper lantern floating in the upper third casting warm gold light. Ink mist rising softly. Vermilion accent on the lantern only. Ryani's profile remains photoreal — meditative pose against the painted Korean scene.
cut3_ryani_with_leo: Replace the floor background with hanji paper texture and soft ink-wash brushstrokes suggesting traditional Korean palace floor. Above and around the pets, several paper lanterns float at different heights in warm gold and deep red. Ink-brush plum blossom branches arch from the upper corners. Gentle gold dust and lantern glow surrounding the two pets. Both pets stay photographic — Ryani's white markings + Leo's tabby stripes intact.
cut4_ryani_peaceful: Transform the vintage chair scene into a quiet sumi-e composition. Ink-wash paper texture surrounds the chair, hanji-light glow. Several paper lanterns drift in the upper background sky in warm gold and deep red, some far some near, creating depth. Ink-brush calligraphy stroke 'happy buddha day' silhouette (not legible letters, just brush gesture) faint on hanji paper. Ryani's sleeping form remains photographic and gentle. Peace and restraint — final frame mood.
